mapper.select: SELECT c.course_id, c.course_name, c.description, i.instructor_id, i.instructor_name, i.email AS instructor_email FROM courses c LEFT JOIN instructors i ON c.instructor_id = i.instructor_id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT c.course_id, c.course_name, c.description, i.instructor_id, i.instructor_name, i.email AS instructor_email FROM courses c LEFT JOIN instructors i ON c.instructor_id = i.instructor_id WHERE c.course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO courses (course_name, description, instructor_id) VALUES (#{req.courseName}, #{req.description}, #{req.instructorId})
